skills.name: replay-cli
skills.description: Record your application to gather performance data and debug issues. It enables users to install Replay ClI, record a session, upload and manage them.

skills.name: replay-cypress
skills.description: Set up and configure Replay for recording Cypress tests with time-travel debugging.

skills.name: replay-mcp
skills.description: Use Replay MCP to inspect the contents of https://replay.io recordings.

skills.name: replay-playwright
skills.description: Set up and run Playwright tests with Replay Browser to record test executions for debugging and performance analysis.
